chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.44 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case For hearing of M.A. No.590/2024 ------------------------------------- 16.05.2025 Mr. Muteeullah Gondal, advocate for applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant does not press this criminal miscellaneous application on the ground that it has become infructuous. In view of such position, instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as having become infructuous. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
